arts.ttl: Netherlands U21s defeat Sweden to complete perfect Euro qualifying campaign
arts.sum: Netherlands U21’s made it 10 wins out of 10 in European Championship qualifing after defeating Sweden U21’s 3-0. Jong Oranje went into the game looking to complete a resounding qualifying campaign and after only two minutes, Emmanuel Emegha headed in the opener. arts.ttl: Undav to miss out against the Netherlands with injury
arts.sum: A muscle injury keeps Deniz Undav out of Germany's team against the Netherlands.
The lineups for Monday's UEFA Nations League clash between Germany and the Netherlands have been announced.

arts.ttl: Why Virgil van Dijk was released early from international duty
arts.sum: Netherlands coach Ronald Koeman has said it "makes sense" for Virgil van Dijk to leave the national team early and report back to Liverpool. "He was a bit too quick with answers," Koeman said of Van Dijk's public desire to stay with the national team.

arts.ttl: Germany vs Netherlands – Nations League Combined XI
arts.sum: Germany host the Netherlands in the UEFA Nations League on Monday evening, in one of international football’s great rivalries. Both teams are aiming to reach the Nations League finals and currently sit first and second in the group ahead of their clash in Munich. arts.ttl: Real Madrid hatch 'secret' Florian Wirtz transfer plan
arts.sum: Real Madrid hatch'secret' Florian Wirtz transfer plan Real Madrid are planning to act in'secrecy' to beat the competition to the signing of Florian Wirtz, according to Spanish media.

arts.sum: Old rivals meet in the UEFA Nations League on Monday night as Germany host the Netherlands at the Allianz Arena in Munich.
